admission_decision.reason: The models identified useful factor families but did not produce a complete artifact that passed syntax and financial review. The admitted programs are deterministic, finite transforms whose incremental value must be established by a matched out-of-sample ablation.

admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Abrupt reversals after an efficient trend can invert the relation.
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: Directional persistence should be more credible when the one-hour path is efficient rather than oscillatory.
admitted_factor_programs.name: trend_quality_60m

admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Exhaustion, liquidation cascades, or informed passive liquidity can make aggressive flow contrarian.
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: A return accompanied by same-direction aggressive taker flow may be more persistent than an unconfirmed move.
admitted_factor_programs.name: flow_confirmation_15m

admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Structural repricing and high-efficiency trends can make standardized extremes persist.
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: An extreme return is more likely to mean-revert when the recent path is inefficient; positive values represent an oversold reversion signal.
admitted_factor_programs.name: conditional_mean_reversion_240m

admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Unstable beta or a common shock not represented by the benchmark can contaminate the residual.
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: Beta-residual momentum scaled by recent volatility isolates asset-specific movement without allowing a near-zero denominator.
admitted_factor_programs.name: residual_risk_adjusted_60m

admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Temporary volume spikes and liquidation flow can be liquid but non-persistent.
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: Aggressive flow observed in at least normal seasonal liquidity should be less vulnerable to a thin-market print than the same flow in poor liquidity.
admitted_factor_programs.name: liquidity_conditioned_flow_5m

admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Semivolatility asymmetry can reflect a completed shock rather than continuation.
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: Positive values identify recent upside-dominated variation; negative values identify downside-dominated variation on a bounded-like scale.
admitted_factor_programs.name: downside_asymmetry_60m

findings: One malformed failure_mode key made the response invalid JSON.
One expression referenced target_cross_asset_return_dispersion_15m_bps, which is not an available feature.
Two safe_div expressions omitted the mandatory positive floor argument.
The path-efficiency mean-reversion rationale did not match the proposed sign interaction.
One safe_div expression omitted the mandatory positive floor argument.
Five of six proposals were bare copies or trivial rescalings of existing features rather than new interactions.
Several expected-regime labels did not correspond to the stated mechanism.
All six failure modes were the literal text positive_floor rather than economic failure conditions.
Four expressions were effectively scalar rescalings of one raw feature.
The cross-asset flow expression divided by agreement, which becomes least stable when agreement is weak.
The critic accepted five of six constrained formulas.
It reversed the sign interpretation of conditional_mean_reversion_240m.
It reversed the sign interpretation of downside_asymmetry_60m.
Model acceptance therefore cannot replace deterministic dimensional and sign checks.

ai_factor_audit.purpose: Use local language models as bounded quantitative-research assistants, then admit only deterministic causal factor programs after independent syntax, numerical, and financial review.

runtime.device_observation: Both local 8B models reported 100% GPU through ollama ps on the AMD host during generation.

models.role: factor proposer and one validator-feedback retry
finance-tuned proposer and independent factor critic

claims.reason: The complete 2025 H1 evaluation window is consumed development evidence. Passing can authorize only a separately frozen confirmation experiment.

ai_uplift_gate.scope: The pre-registered long-only augmented-minus-baseline pair only.

amplitude_calibration.method: nonnegative zero-intercept ordinary least squares on the immediately preceding calibration month

comparators.always_long_fixed_sleeves: Each symbol sleeve enters long once, remains long, and exits once under identical funding and transition charges.
comparators.independent_hourly_round_trip: Use the same calibrated forecasts but force every accepted hourly exposure flat at the interval end, reproducing the prior independent-round-trip cost abstraction.
comparators.stateful_policy: Carry unchanged exposure and charge only actual position transitions.

evaluation_contract.portfolio_return_series: One-third weighted sum of each sleeve signed pre-transition utility less actual transition costs.
required_metrics: hourly and compounded total net return
Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, and profit factor
hourly VaR and expected shortfall at 95 percent
entries, exits, reversals, transition units, turnover, active hours, active days, holding duration, and transitions per day
Pearson IC, Spearman IC, direction accuracy, MAE, RMSE, and prediction dispersion

feature_ablation.augmented: The identical 71 features plus the six factor programs in the bound Round 43 AI factor audit
feature_ablation.baseline: 71 causal price, volume, taker-flow, cross-asset, liquidity, volatility, residual, calendar, and symbol features from the verified Round 37/38 matrix

model_contract.architecture: one shared cross-asset LightGBM L1 return regressor per evaluation month and feature set

design.phase: consumed-development stateful hourly position conversion and AI-research factor ablation

position_and_cost_contract.cost_filter: Change to forecast-implied position only when absolute calibrated forecast bps is greater than 2.0 times one-way cost bps times absolute position change; otherwise retain current position.
position_and_cost_contract.maximum_hold_action: Force the affected sleeve flat for the next interval and charge the applicable transition cost.

predecessor_evidence.diagnosed_defect: Every prior replay treated an accepted forecast as a new round trip. None represented holding an existing position across adjacent forecasts or charged turnover only on exposure changes.
predecessor_evidence.round_37: The best shared 120-minute return model reached only 0.043704 Spearman IC and no support-valid policy; isolated selected tails were concentrated in SOLUSDT.
predecessor_evidence.round_38_to_41: Cost-aware labels, rolling refits, and profitability meta-labels produced activity but failed stable out-of-sample after-cost gates.
predecessor_evidence.round_42: The second-flow timing overlay selected no actions; its matched immediate proposals averaged -15.281501 bps after a 12 bps independent round-trip charge.

design.registered_experiment: Replace isolated fixed-horizon round trips with a persistent hourly position state whose costs occur only when exposure changes, then compare the same shared LightGBM with and without six pre-outcome AI-research-assisted interaction factors.
required_outputs: hash-bound design, AI audit, execution binding, implementation blobs, and source certificate
hourly row counts and causality identities by role and symbol
all twelve model artifacts, exact reload checks, backend evidence, and top feature gains
forecast diagnostics by month, symbol, and feature set
complete base and stress position ledgers for all four candidates and comparators
monthly and symbol economics, transition and holding diagnostics, and drawdown series
familywise block-bootstrap candidate intervals and paired AI-uplift interval
runtime, progress, peak memory, and explicit gate reasons
explicit false promotion, authority, leverage, confirmation, profitability, and AI-uplift claims when gates fail

research_basis.title: Machine Learning-Based Bitcoin Trading Under Transaction Costs: Evidence From Walk-Forward Forecasting
research_basis.use: Supports persistent position state and a cost-aware transition filter; its hourly BTC results and simplified execution model are not imported as validation.

research_basis.title: AlphaForgeBench: Benchmarking End-to-End Trading Strategy Design with Large Language Models
research_basis.use: Supports using language models as reproducible factor researchers rather than unstable sequential execution agents.

research_basis.title: FactorEngine: A Program-level Knowledge-Infused Factor Mining Framework for Quantitative Investment
research_basis.use: Supports separating bounded LLM-guided logic proposals from deterministic local evaluation and parameter fitting.

research_basis.title: Momentum in the Cryptocurrency Market: A Comprehensive Analysis under Realistic Assumptions
research_basis.use: Supports retaining time-series rather than three-asset cross-sectional momentum as the primary direction and reporting liquidation and drawdown risk rather than mean return alone.

design.revision_reason: The first bound execution trained all twelve models but stopped before any replay or performance result because the v1 per-month evaluation mask embargoed each month-end 23:00 decision while the position contract required continuous carry. Version 2 keeps target purging at training, early-stop, and calibration boundaries, but permits a month-end evaluation interval to settle at the next month's 00:01 boundary. No model, factor, cost, threshold, source, candidate, or gate changed.

stateful_viability_gate.meaning: Passing supports only a newly frozen confirmation experiment; it cannot promote a model or authorize testnet or live trading.

target_contract.decision_timestamp: UTC hour at minute zero using features ending at that minute close
target_contract.entry_or_rebalance_timestamp: decision timestamp plus one minute, at the real next-minute open
target_contract.funding: Exact settled funding cash flow embedded with opposite sign for long and short
target_contract.next_decision_entry_contiguity: The next hourly decision executes at the current interval exit, so unchanged exposure is carried without a fictitious close and reopen.

walk_forward_contract.evaluation_month_end_interval_policy: Include a decision made in the evaluation month when its real 60-minute interval settles after midnight; assign its return to the decision month and let the next monthly model begin at the same exit/entry timestamp.
walk_forward_contract.per_month_schedule: 24 complete training months, two immediately following early-stop months, one immediately following amplitude-calibration month, then one evaluation month
